ci_support_linux_64_tg_aarch64.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
glib:
- '2'
target_platform:
- linux-64
tg_:
- aarch64
zig_compiler:
- zig
zig_compiler_version:
- 0.15.2
zlib:
- '1'

about.description: - qemu-execve-{arch}: execve interception for conda cross-compilation
about.summary: QEMU linux-user emulator with stability patches and variant support

script: grep -q ${{ tg_ }} output.txt && { echo 'QEMU executes binary for emulated arch: OK'; }
grep -q 'hello_from' ls_host.txt && { echo 'execve() calls native ld without QEMU_EXECVE: OK'; }
QEMU_EXECVE=${PREFIX}/bin/qemu-execve-${{ tg_ }} qemu-execve-${{ tg_ }} ./execve_call /bin/ls > ls_redirect.txt 2>&1 || true
grep -q Invalid ls_redirect.txt && { echo 'Invalid exec for native /bin/ls with EXECVE flag: OK'; }
QEMU_EXECVE=${PREFIX}/bin/qemu-execve-${{ tg_ }} qemu-execve-${{ tg_ }} ./execve_call ./hello_from EXECVE > execve_test.txt 2>&1 || true
grep -q 'EXECVE' execve_test.txt && { echo 'execve() calls emulated arch ld with QEMU_EXECVE set: OK'; }
grep -q ${{ tg_ }} output.txt && { echo 'QEMU executes binary for emulated arch: OK'; }
grep -q 'hello_from' ls_host.txt && { echo 'execve() calls native ld without QEMU_EXECVE: OK'; }

grep -q Invalid ls_redirect.txt && { echo 'Invalid exec for native /bin/ls with EXECVE flag: OK'; }

name: qemu-execve-s390x
raw_meta_yaml:
context:
  build_number: 2
  version: "10.2.2"

  # Computed from tg_ variant (target architecture)
  qemu_user_sysroot:         ${{ "powerpc64le" if tg_ == "ppc64le" else tg_ }}
  qemu_user_gcc:             ${{ qemu_user_sysroot }}-conda-linux-gnu-gcc

recipe:
  name: qemu-execve-split
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://gitlab.com/qemu-project/qemu/-/archive/v${{ version }}/qemu-v${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: a047e169ddf82ee8b023b754e465ad9b2e632fa1aa52ff786eb9df72e5de7d40
  target_directory: qemu_source
  patches:
    - patches/base/missing-RESOLVE_CACHED.patch
    - patches/base/0001-linux-user-signal-fixes.patch
    - patches/base/0002-linux-user-syscall-fixes.patch
    - patches/base/configure-host-os-override.patch

build:
  number: ${{ build_number }}
  skip: not linux

outputs:
  - package:
      name: qemu-execve-${{ tg_ }}
    build:
      skip: not linux
      script:
        env:
          CONDA_QEMU_TARGET: "${{ tg_ }}"
          CONDA_QEMU_VARIANT: "execve"
      files:
        include:
          - bin/qemu-execve-${{ tg_ }}
          - etc/conda/activate.d/qemu-execve-${{ tg_ }}-activate.sh
          - etc/conda/deactivate.d/qemu-execve-${{ tg_ }}-deactivate.sh
      dynamic_linking:
        overdepending_behavior: "error"
        overlinking_behavior: "error"
        missing_dso_allowlist:
          - libc.so.6
          - ld-linux-x86-64.so.2
          - libm.so.6
          - libpthread.so.0
          - librt.so.1
    requirements:
      ignore_run_exports:
        from_package:
          - libslirp
          - if: tg_ != "aarch64"
            then:
              - zlib
      build:
        - ${{ compiler('zig') }}
        - bash >=5.2
        - git
        - meson
        - ninja
        - pkg-config
        - python 3.12.*
      host:
        - glib
        - libcapstone
        - libslirp
        - zlib
      run:
        - libcapstone
        - libglib
    tests:
      - package_contents:
          strict: true
          bin:
            - qemu-execve-${{ tg_ }}
          files:
            - etc/conda/activate.d/qemu-execve-${{ tg_ }}-activate.sh
            - etc/conda/deactivate.d/qemu-execve-${{ tg_ }}-deactivate.sh
            - etc/conda/test-files/qemu-execve-${{ tg_ }}/*
      - script:
          - test -n "${QEMU_LD_PREFIX}"
          - qemu-execve-${{ tg_ }} --version | grep ${{ version }}
 
          # Cross-compile test binaries
          - export QEMU_CPU=${{ "power9" if tg_ == "ppc64le" else "max" }}

          - if: tg_ != "ppc64le" and tg_ != "s390x"
            then:
              - export ZIG_GLOBAL_CACHE_DIR=$(mktemp -d)
              - ${{ qemu_user_sysroot }}-conda-linux-gnu-zig cc -target ${{ qemu_user_sysroot }}-linux-musl -o hello_from tests/hello_from.c
              - ${{ qemu_user_sysroot }}-conda-linux-gnu-zig cc -target ${{ qemu_user_sysroot }}-linux-musl -o execve_call tests/execve_call.c
            else:
              - ${{ qemu_user_sysroot }}-conda-linux-gnu-gcc -static -o hello_from tests/hello_from.c
              - ${{ qemu_user_sysroot }}-conda-linux-gnu-gcc -static -o execve_call tests/execve_call.c

          # Test 1: Normal execution of cross-compiled binary
          - qemu-execve-${{ tg_ }} ./hello_from ${{ tg_ }} > output.txt
          - "grep -q ${{ tg_ }} output.txt && { echo 'QEMU executes binary for emulated arch: OK'; }"

          # Test 2: execve() of host binary (should work - runs on host)
          - qemu-execve-${{ tg_ }} ./execve_call /bin/ls > ls_host.txt 2>&1 || true
          - "grep -q 'hello_from' ls_host.txt && { echo 'execve() calls native ld without QEMU_EXECVE: OK'; }"

          # Test 3: Redirected execve() of host binary (should fail - wrong ELF)
          - QEMU_EXECVE=${PREFIX}/bin/qemu-execve-${{ tg_ }} qemu-execve-${{ tg_ }} ./execve_call /bin/ls > ls_redirect.txt 2>&1 || true
          - "! grep -q 'hello_from' ls_redirect.txt"  # proves interception occurred (ls didn't run)
          - "grep -q Invalid ls_redirect.txt && { echo 'Invalid exec for native /bin/ls with EXECVE flag: OK'; }"

          # Test 4: Redirected execve() of cross-compiled binary (should work via qemu)
          - QEMU_EXECVE=${PREFIX}/bin/qemu-execve-${{ tg_ }} qemu-execve-${{ tg_ }} ./execve_call ./hello_from EXECVE > execve_test.txt 2>&1 || true
          - "grep -q 'EXECVE' execve_test.txt && { echo 'execve() calls emulated arch ld with QEMU_EXECVE set: OK'; }"
            
        requirements:
          run:
            - if: tg_ != "ppc64le" and tg_ != "s390x"
              then:
                - zig_linux-${{ tg_ }}
              else:
                - gcc_linux-${{ tg_ }}
        files:
          recipe:
            - tests/hello_from.c
            - tests/execve_call.c

about:
  homepage: https://gitlab.com/qemu-project/qemu
  summary: 'QEMU linux-user emulator with stability patches and variant support'
  description: |
    - qemu-execve-{arch}: execve interception for conda cross-compilation
  license: GPL-2.0-only
  license_file:
    - qemu_source/LICENSE

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - MementoRC
